title: Excalibur | Apotheosis Support
description: This is a support pack that converts Apotheosis Mod textures to better match the awesome Excalibur ResourcePack.
body:
![Excalibur_Apotheosis Support](https://i.postimg.cc/x8QVcDLQ/Apotheosis-Excalibur-Presentation-Platform.png)

This is a support pack that converts Apotheosis Mod textures to better match the awesome [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) ResourcePack.

Head over to the Excalibur Discord to follow the development of Excalibur and this addon.

This Pack contains :

- All blocks, items and GUI have been retextured/remodeled to match Excalibur style/theme.

Installation :

Ingame

-> Click "Options…"

-> Click "Resource Packs…"

-> Click "Open Resource Pack Folder"

-> Drag and Drop the Excalibur_Apotheosis Addon.zip file into the "resourcepacks" folder

-> Move the Excalibur Apotheosis Support resource pack from the left column to the right

-> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

-> Select "Done"

![Excalibur_Apotheosis Models](https://i.postimg.cc/k44F1X6T/Apotheosis-Excalibur-Support-Models-4.png)

![Excalibur_Apotheosis Items](https://i.postimg.cc/2jwqzH7h/Apotheosis-items.png)

Credits :

Maffhew - Author of the resourcepack [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)

Shadows_of_Fire - Author of the mod Apotheosis

Abyssal_Kutku - He helped me on this project
